scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n "API,WORKER,WEB" -c "yellow,green,cyan" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w packages/worker" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.start: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n "API,WORKER,WEB" -c "yellow,green,cyan" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start -w packages/api" "npm run start -w packages/worker" "npm run start -w packages/web"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json
